title: JENOLITE Brake Cleaner Spray | 400ml | Heavy Duty Brake Cleaner | Cleans Brakes Without Disassembly | Reduces Brake Noise & Improves Brake Performance | Removes Dirt & Grime | Disc and Drum Brakes
features: Heavy Duty Brake Cleaner: JENOLITE Brake Cleaner Spray delivers heavy-duty performance, effortlessly removing dirt, grease, and grime from disc and drum brakes, ensuring optimal functionality every time.

Reduces Brake Noise & Enhances Performance: Designed to clean without disassembly, this advanced formula disc brake cleaner, reduces brake noise and improves brake performance, giving you smoother and quieter braking with every use.

Quick and Efficient Application: The 400ml brake cleaner aerosol spray allows for precise and mess-free application, making it easy to target hard-to-reach areas for thorough cleaning in seconds. The car brake cleaner is suitable for use as drum brake cleaner and as a disc brake cleaner. It can also be used as a motorcycle brake cleaner.
Versatile Heavy-Duty Cleaner: Perfect for both disc and drum brakes, this powerful brake cleaner is a must-have for maintaining brake systems on cars, motorcycles, and other vehicles.

Trusted by Experts: Backed by JENOLITE’s reputation for quality and reliability, this brake cleaner ensures professional-level results, whether you’re a DIY enthusiast or a seasoned mechanic looking for a reliable brakes and clutch cleaner.
